message:
🐛 Fix update detection: ignore untracked files, add periodic poll

- git status -uno: only check tracked files for uncommitted changes
  (untracked folders like .netlify/ were falsely blocking updates)
- Add 60s periodic poll to fetch auto-update status from kc-agent
  so the UI detects new commits without manual "Check Now"
- Extract all magic numbers into named constants

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
